summary: Iteration 37 - Care Requests Form Refactoring. Backend: 11/11 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All UI tests PASS. Successfully verified the new comprehensive 'Solicitud de Servicio' form for senior care. The old pet-based form was replaced with a 3-step process collecting patient info, location, and care details.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/care-requests validates patient_name is required (400 error)
POST /api/care-requests validates comuna is required (400 error)
POST /api/care-requests validates description is required (400 error)

POST /api/care-requests creates request with all new schema fields (service_type, patient_name, patient_age, patient_gender, relationship, room_type, special_needs array, urgency, budget_min, budget_max, comuna, region, description)
GET /api/care-requests/my-requests returns requests with new schema fields
DELETE /api/care-requests/{id} deletes request and removes from list
Cleanup: TEST_ prefixed requests deleted successfully
frontend_ui_tests: Dashboard header 'Hola, Usuario Demo!' has correct color #33404f (rgb(51, 64, 79))
'Solicitudes de Servicio' title shown (not old 'Solicitudes de Cuidado')
Form has 3 steps: Paciente, Ubicación, Detalles
Step 1 has: service type selector, patient name, age, gender, relationship, room type fields
Step 2 has: comuna, region, urgency, budget min/max fields
Step 3 has: 12 special needs toggle buttons, description textarea
Form submission creates request and shows it in list with success toast
Existing request displays new schema data (patient name, age, budget range, special needs tags)

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx line 112: 'Hola, {user.name}!' correctly uses text-[#33404f] color class
CareRequestsClient.jsx: Complete rewrite with 3-step form works correctly
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Backend CareRequestCreate model correctly validates required fields (patient_name, comuna, description)
No pet-related dependencies in the new form - patient_name replaced pet_id
seed_data_creation: Test requests with TEST_ prefix created during testing and cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37: Care Requests form refactoring COMPLETE. The old pet-based 'Solicitudes de Cuidado' was replaced with new senior care 'Solicitud de Servicio' 3-step form. Backend endpoints at /api/care-requests support full CRUD with new schema (service_type, patient_name, patient_age, patient_gender, relationship, room_type, special_needs array, urgency, budget_min, budget_max, comuna, region, description). Frontend CareRequestsClient component has 3-step wizard with all fields. Header color changed to #33404f. All tests passed.
